rows.label: qev060502_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oh... [ST:playername ]? What are you doing
in a place like this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060502_MSG0002
rows.name:
Arsenican and I just finished
revoltanting a large amount of
Voltant for the first time in a while.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060502_MSG0003
rows.name:
Heheh, we must thank Golbogga for bestowing
this good fortune upon us... indeed.[ST:wait ]
